visual_description: A man in a dark suit stands with his back to the camera, facing a row of aquariums. A woman in a patterned top and a man in a suit with a checkered tie stand near a wooden door, partially obscured by a lampshade. The woman looks down while the man smiles slightly and glances toward her.
